data.title: Sage expands AI agents across finance, HR and operations to automate workflows and help teams act faster with control
data.description: Sage has recently introduced a cutting-edge lineup of AI agents intended to streamline financial, workforce, and operational processes. This new generation of AI agents aims to enhance efficiency and productivity across various workflows within organizations.

data.title: Sharc Energy Closes Second Tranche of Debenture
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 28, 2026, SHARC International Systems Inc. (CSE: SHRC) (FSE: IWIA) (OTCQB: INTWF) has successfully completed the second part of a non-brokered private placement. The placement involved unsecured convertible debentures totaling $300,000, resulting in a cumulative total of $600,000 raised so far by the Company. This development follows previous announcements on February 17, 2026, and February 23, 2026.

data.title: HKMA cautions against fake tokens linked to stablecoin issuers HSBC and Standard Chartered. Be cautious.
data.description: HKMA issued a caution about tokens wrongly associated with licensed stablecoin issuers HSBC and Standard Chartered. The warning emphasizes the importance of verifying the legitimacy of such tokens.

data.title: Ecopetrol announces the dates for the release of its first quarter 2026 earnings report and conference call
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, on April 28, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A revealed that it will unveil its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, post-market closure. The company, trading as BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC, will share the details of its performance on Wednesday, May 13, 2026.

data.title: Black Hat Asia 2026 Unveils Key Insights on AI Security and Cloud Infrastructure as APAC Organizations Strengthen Cyber Defenses
data.description: Black Hat, a leading cybersecurity event series, has announced the successful conclusion of the in-person segment of Black Hat Asia 2026 held at Marina Bay Sands Expo & Convention Centre in Singapore. The event gathered security experts from Asia-Pacific and beyond, providing insights on autonomous cyber threats, fragmented data protection frameworks, and defensive strategies. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and aimed to address key challenges faced in the industry.

data.title: Global Times: From seawater to green hydrogen, and beyond, Qingdao charts a new growth path
data.description: In Beijing on April 28, 2026, at the expansive coastal industrial park of Sinopec Qingdao Refining & Chemical Co, a leading oil refiner in China, a new innovative facility operates quietly. The facility stands out amid the vast industrial landscape, showcasing a significant development in the sector.

data.title: Tamarack Resort Announces 2026 Summer Events Lineup and Marina Debut
data.description: In Tamarack, Idaho, on April 28, 2026, it was announced that Tamarack Resort is gearing up for the 2026 summer season with notable developments. The resort will introduce new offerings, expand recreational activities, and host various events from spring to fall. Key highlights include the debut of the Tamarack Marina, presenting an array of opportunities for visitors to indulge in the scenic surroundings. This initiative underlines a series of enhancements, indicative of the resort's commitment to providing an enriched experience for guests.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: The first-quarter earnings call and webcast for 2026 are scheduled to take place on Thursday, May 7th.

data.title: THE COOLTURE REVOLUTION: REALTY ONE GROUP INTERNATIONAL CRUSHES CORPORATE STAGNATION
data.description: The leading and fastest-growing family-owned real estate powerhouse in the world has demonstrated why Wall Street cannot rival their heart and soul. Based in Laguna Niguel, California, as of April 28, 2026, this company has emerged as the largest in the industry. Amidst the current landscape where Wall Street executives and corporate entities dominate, this family-owned business shines through with its unique approach and values.
